item.title: I built a free Android soundboard that works with a External keyboard
item.description: A few months ago I needed a simple soundboard for a live session. I wanted to trigger audio clips from a Bluetooth keyboard connected to my Android phone - just press a key, hear the sound, instantly. Every app I found was either subscription-based, required an account, or didn’t support physical keyboards at all. So I built CTunes. What CTunes does CTunes maps keyboard keys (A-Z and 0-9) to audio files on your device.
